title: Aranet Temperature Excursion Outside HVAC Setpoint Band
app: Custom HEC or scripted input from Aranet Cloud API / Aranet PRO base station
spl:
index=environment sourcetype="aranet:sensor" earliest=-24h
| eval temp=tonumber(coalesce(temp_c, temperature_c, ""))
| eval setpoint=tonumber(coalesce(hvac_setpoint_c, "22"))
| eval delta=abs(temp-setpoint)
| where delta>2
| timechart span=30m perc95(delta) by location
description: Drift from setpoint wastes energy or risks asset cooling; Aranet temperature telemetry validates BMS performance room by room.
value: Reduces energy spend and prevents thermal excursions in IDF closets.
implementation: (1) Optional join setpoint from BMS lookup. (2) Tune band (°C). (3) Alert on sustained excursion. (4) Handoff to controls vendor.
grandmaExplanation: We flag rooms that stay too hot or cold compared to the target temperature.
